card.headline: Two protocols failing at easiest level
reasons: OS_pianoseq and OS_twister stay at zero performance despite minimal difficulty—patient is stuck; switch protocols or coach setup.

params.topic: OS_pianoseq/OS_twister failing at easiest level; assess barriers and provide coaching or swap

items.text: OS_pianoseq and OS_twister stay at zero performance despite minimal difficulty—patient is stuck; switch protocols or coach setup.

checkin.wins: Saturday looked like a breakthrough day—you stacked sessions and stayed with Balloons Basic even as it pushed you. Driving also felt steadier.
checkin.to_improve: Try adding a quick Twister or Blobs round on an easier day so the week feels more spread out.
